title: Array index used as a key
message: Your users can see & submit the wrong data when this list reorders or filters, so use a stable id like `key={item.id}`, not the array index "index".
help: Use a stable id from the item, like `key={item.id}` or `key={item.slug}`. Index keys break when the list reorders or filters.
